message: bpf_redirect_map reaches the helper with xsks_map declared as a normal array, but XDP socket redirect requires BPF_MAP_TYPE_XSKMAP
required_proof: the map passed as argument 1 to bpf_redirect_map must be redirect-capable while the round-robin socket index and fallback action are preserved

related_spans.label: map declaration does not match the XDP socket redirect helper contract
round-robin socket slot state must still feed the redirect helper

evidence.detail: cannot pass map_type 2 into func bpf_redirect_map#51
bpf_redirect_map in an XDP socket redirect path must receive BPF_MAP_TYPE_XSKMAP, not BPF_MAP_TYPE_ARRAY

help: Keep the round-robin rr update and the bpf_redirect_map call with XDP_DROP fallback; replacing the redirect with a direct XDP_DROP is not an equivalent xdpsock repair.
